节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The context of window extension. It allows access to windowExtension-specific resources.
Window extension uses this method to start a specific ability. 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates the ability to start.
@param { StartOptions } options - Indicates the start options.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - The callback of startAbility.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible cause: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

error_codes.description: Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
Parameter error. Possible cause: 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
